caveats: LoCoMo, KnowMe, and CloneMem are still historical audited references rather than current-snapshot reruns.
The user-stated higher scores remain unverified and are not part of the accepted baseline.

mixed-audit-20260418.summary: Verified current-code LongMemEval plus audited historical multi-benchmark references.

latest-longmemeval-validated-20260418.summary: Verified 500-question LongMemEval validation on the repaired latest snapshot.

metrics.label: LongMemEval Recall@5
metrics.description: Fraction of LongMemEval questions with a relevant hit in the top 5 retrieved results.
metrics.derivation: Direct benchmark output from the repaired 500-question LongMemEval validation on the latest snapshot.

metrics.derivation: Direct benchmark output from the repaired 500-question LongMemEval validation on the latest snapshot.
